name: Upgrade ROSA HCP Machine Pool
description: Upgrade a ROSA HCP cluster machine pool to the next available OpenShift version via ROSAMachinePool spec.version patch

playbooks.name: Upgrade Machine Pool
playbooks.description: Upgrades the ROSAMachinePool to the next available version and waits for completion

documentation.overview: This test suite upgrades a ROSA HCP cluster's machine pool version. It auto-detects the pool name and next available upgrade version, patches the ROSAMachinePool resource, and waits for the upgrade to complete. The control plane must be upgraded first.
prerequisites: An existing ROSA HCP cluster with machine pool in ready state
Control plane already upgraded to the target version or higher
MCE/ACM hub cluster with CAPI/CAPA configured

quick_start.description: Auto-discovers the machine pool and upgrades to the first available version

customization.pool_name: Name of the ROSAMachinePool resource (optional, auto-discovered if omitted)
customization.requested_version: Specific version to upgrade to (optional, defaults to first available)
customization.capi_namespace: Namespace containing the ROSAMachinePool resource (default: ns-rosa-hcp)

expected_results: ROSAMachinePool spec.version patched to requested version
Playbook waits for ROSAMachinePool status.ready to become true
All replicas upgraded and ready (max wait: 60 minutes)
